spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
spacing_and_layout.container_alignment: Dense, grid-based, using flex-col and h-full for children.

rules: Flat backgrounds using zinc-900 or zinc-950
No drop shadows. Use inner glow or border highlights for active states
Terminal Look for Execution Logs: bg-black with border-zinc-800 and JetBrains Mono text

cards.default: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-50 p-4 sm:p-6 rounded-sm

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.kill_switch: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white font-black px-6 py-4 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest border border-red-400 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(220,38,38,0.5)] transition-all animate-pulse hover:animate-none
buttons.toggle: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-sm border border-zinc-700 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-zinc-50 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 transition-all font-mono text-sm

charts.style: Minimalist, no grid lines or very faint border-zinc-800 lines. Bright accent colors for series (Cyan, Emerald, Amber).

terminal.container: bg-black border border-zinc-800 p-4 rounded-sm h-64 overflow-y-auto

login_background.description: Dark, moody abstract texture background for auth screen

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Border color shift and slight background brightness increase. No scaling (keep it rigid).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use monospace ASCII loaders (e.g., [ ||||    ] ) or fast pulse.
motion_and_interactions.active_indicators: The 'Tracing Beam' effect for Risk Guard Engine when active or scanning.
motion_and_interactions.alerts: Sonner toast notifications. Slide-in from bottom right. Strict red for errors/Kill Switch, green for success.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text passes APCA/WCAG standards. Do not use dark gray on black. Use zinc-400 minimum on zinc-950.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='kill-switch-btn')

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the dark mode theme. The body background should be zinc-950.
Implement the layout as a dense 'Control Room' grid. No rounded massive padding.
For the Execution Logs Terminal, use JetBrains Mono and a pure black (#000000) background to simulate a CLI.
The Kill Switch button must be highly prominent, using red-600 with a subtle drop shadow or pulse animation to indicate critical action.
Use Shadcn UI but aggressively override any soft rounded corners (use rounded-none or rounded-sm) and drop shadows (replace with 1px borders).
Install the required fonts via Google Fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Ensure 'Real-time Market Data Charts' use dark backgrounds and high-contrast lines (e.g., bright cyan for WTI, bright purple for Bond).
Implement a clear visual distinction for the 4 system states (SAFE: green, WARNING: amber, EXIT_ONLY: orange, HALT: red).
Do not use generic dummy text; use realistic financial/trading data placeholders if real data is not connected yet.
